_source: SYNTHETIC merged MCP catalog used to exercise the verb classifier (catalog.ts) and intent matcher (intent-matcher.ts). Names use the host's `<server>__<tool>` namespacing convention — the way Cursor / Claude Code present a merged multi-server catalog — because each server's own README lists BARE tool names and the host adds the server prefix on merge. PROVENANCE, stated precisely: the `filesystem__*` names are the real @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem tool set (read_text_file, write_file, edit_file, list_directory, create_directory, search_files, directory_tree), verified verbatim against https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/blob/main/src/filesystem/README.md on 2026-06-03, then namespaced. The `postgres__*`, `github__*`, `slack__*`, and `linear__*` names are REPRESENTATIVE — modeled on those services' conventional operations, NOT verified verbatim against their READMEs. `ambiguous_tool_xyz` is a deliberate no-verb-token entry for the fail-safe-to-include path. No test asserts against external truth (the proxy is purely name-driven), so representative names are sufficient; this note exists so a reader knows exactly which names are verified and which are illustrative.

tools.name: postgres__query
tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query against the configured Postgres database.

sql.description: The SQL query to execute. Read-only.

tools.name: postgres__list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the connected Postgres database.

tools.name: filesystem__read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file as text. Supports optional head/tail line limits.

tools.name: filesystem__write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file with new content.

tools.name: filesystem__edit_file
tools.description: Make line-based edits to a text file, returning a git-style diff of the changes.

tools.name: filesystem__list_directory
tools.description: List the contents of a directory, marking entries as [FILE] or [DIR].

tools.name: filesystem__create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory, including any necessary parent directories.

tools.name: filesystem__search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern within a path.

tools.name: filesystem__directory_tree
tools.description: Return a recursive JSON tree view of files and directories under a path.

tools.name: github__create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.

tools.name: github__list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository, optionally filtered by state and labels.

tools.name: github__search_code
tools.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories.

tools.name: github__create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository.

tools.name: slack__post_message
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel.

tools.name: slack__list_channels
tools.description: List channels in the Slack workspace.

tools.name: linear__create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in Linear.

tools.name: linear__update_issue
tools.description: Update fields on a Linear issue.

tools.name: ambiguous_tool_xyz
tools.description: An MCP tool whose name carries no recognized verb token, used to verify fail-safe-to-include behavior of the verb classifier.
